scripts.dev:ports-free: bash -c 'for p in 7000 7001; do pid=$(lsof -ti :$p 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$pid" ] && kill -9 $pid; done; echo Ports 7000 and 7001 freed'
scripts.build:backend: npm run build -w backend && cp -r backend/dist dist
scripts.test:local: npm run build -w backend && npm run test -w backend && npm run build -w web
scripts.db:seed: npx prisma generate --schema=database/schema.prisma && npx ts-node --compiler-options '{"module":"CommonJS"}' database/seed.ts
scripts.db:seed:content: npx prisma generate --schema=database/schema.prisma && npx ts-node --compiler-options '{"module":"CommonJS"}' database/seed-world-class-content.ts
